message:
fix: context timeouts on all external commands, env dedup, notify hardening

Context timeouts:
- All exec.Command("git", ...) and notification commands now use
  exec.CommandContext with 5s (git) / 10s (notifications/hooks) timeouts
- Extract getGitInfoWithTimeout/runGitInfoCommand helpers

Hook executor environment:
- Replace naive append(env, k+"="+v) with normalizeEnvironment,
  setEnvironmentValue, mergeEnvironmentMap helpers
- Dedup on construction, sorted map merges for deterministic order

Notify system:
- Deep-clone config on New() preventing caller mutation
- Close() calls httpClient.CloseIdleConnections()
- hooks/config.go: Validate() trims whitespace before empty check
- session/restore.go: nil-guard on state parameter

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
